name: promptpic
description: Open PromptPic from Codex and guide canvas-based AI image design workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Open PromptPic as a canvas-based AI image studio from Codex.
interface.longDescription: PromptPic helps Codex users open the PromptPic web canvas, generate images, use generated images as references, and keep project assets organized in the current workspace.
defaultPrompt: Open PromptPic and design a reference image.
Generate image assets and save them locally.
Use PromptPic as my canvas design workspace.
